utilityName: Castle Rock Water Cross-Connection and Backflow Program
dueBasis: Castle Rock says annual testing is required, compliance is managed by Castle Rock Water, and only certified testers may work in town.
officialListLabel: Open the Castle Rock certified backflow tester list

penalties: If the work falls outside the accepted tester and documentation path, the customer risks missing the local compliance requirement.
sourceExcerpt: Castle Rock is a strong Colorado utility because annual testing, tester certification, and the official tester list all line up on the same utility workflow.
verdictSummary: Castle Rock is a strong Colorado page because annual testing, tester certification, and the live town tester list all line up on the same utility workflow.
whoIsAffected: Castle Rock Water customers with irrigation, fire suppression, and other protected assemblies that require certified annual testing.
residentialNotes: Residential demand is strongest for irrigation systems and other properties with real protected assemblies.
Castle Rock makes the certified tester requirement explicit.
commercialNotes: Commercial value is strong because the town keeps certification, insurance, and calibration expectations visible.
This is a good approved-tester route for Colorado expansion.

annualTesting.summary: Castle Rock Water says annual backflow testing is required and only certified testers may do the work in town.
highlights: Only certified testers may test in Castle Rock.
The public tester list requires current certification, gauge calibration, and insurance.
workflowSteps: Confirm the device is inside Castle Rock Water's program.
Choose a certified tester from the town list.
Complete the annual test and keep the local record current.

irrigation.summary: Castle Rock is strong for irrigation because the town calls for periodic testing of irrigation systems and keeps a public certified tester list.
highlights: Irrigation systems are a clear local trigger.
The town discourages bad blowout setups around the backflow device.
Certified testers are public and current.
workflowSteps: Confirm the irrigation device and seasonal service plan.
Use a certified tester from the town list.
Keep the annual record current with Castle Rock Water.

Certification, calibration, and insurance are part of the accepted vendor standard.
workflowSteps: Confirm the fire protection assembly class.
